market_context:
Cohort size: 201 listings scraped in the same market.
Median nightly rate: £154.60
Median 90-day occupancy: 47.8%

title_variants: Luxury Family Home w/ 6‑Car Driveway & Pool Table
Home Theater + Pool Table + Spacious Parking
Family‑Friendly Luxury Home with Projector & Pool
analysis.rewritten_desc:
Welcome to your perfect family getaway in this entire‑home retreat, thoughtfully designed for up to 4 guests. Hosted by Taylor, a fresh host eager to provide a flawless stay, the property boasts a pristine 4‑star rating of 4.9 from 71 glowing reviews. Each night is priced at £162, just a modest £7 above the city’s median rate, delivering excellent value for the premium amenities on offer.

Step inside to discover a spacious living area equipped with a high‑definition projector—ideal for movie nights or catching up on your favorite shows. A stylish pool table sits ready for friendly competition, adding a fun entertainment hub for families and groups. The home also features a fully equipped kitchen, comfortable bedrooms, and modern bathrooms, ensuring every comfort is covered during your stay.

One of the standout features is the expansive 6‑car driveway, providing ample parking for larger families or groups traveling together—an uncommon convenience in the area. Whether you’re planning a weekend escape or a longer vacation, the combination of luxury, entertainment, and practical amenities makes this home a top‑choice destination.

Book now and enjoy a high‑quality, hassle‑free experience backed by a host who values your comfort above all.
top_amenity_gaps: Entertainment amenities (pool table, projector) not listed as amenities
Parking convenience not emphasized in amenities list
analysis.photo_order_rec: Use the pool table in the living area as the cover photo—it instantly showcases the unique entertainment offering and captures the spacious, family‑friendly vibe.
key_diagnosis: Rate is only +5% above the cohort median (£162 vs £154.60) while occupancy is at the median (47.8% booked), indicating price isn’t the barrier—lowering the nightly rate a few pounds could unlock the 47 open nights and boost bookings.
The current title is cluttered and lacks high‑impact keywords; replace it with a concise, SEO‑friendly version that highlights the 6‑car driveway and entertainment features.
The listing has no description; add a 200‑300‑word compelling narrative that repeats the key facts (capacity, rate, rating, amenities) and appeals to family travelers.
analysis.outreach_hook: You have 47 open nights that could generate £7,614 at your current nightly rate.
